text: EYE HOSPITAL AND VERTIGO CLINIC ; PERSONALIZED CARE Skip to content Call Us at  861 830 5901 or 9944 529 444 Abhigna Eye and Vertigo Hospital Personalized Eye Care and Walk Ahead ; Beyond vertigo HOME Dr Jaitra EYE CARE CATARACT SURGERY OPTICALS VERTIGO CARE OUR CONSULTANTS CONTACT US GALLERY Call Us at  861 830 5901 or 9944 529 444 Abhigna Eye and Vertigo Hospital Personalized Eye Care and Walk Ahead ; Beyond vertigo Navigation Menu Navigation Menu HOME Dr Jaitra EYE CARE CATARACT SURGERY OPTICALS VERTIGO CARE OUR CONSULTANTS CONTACT US GALLERY HOME WELCOME TO ABHIGNA EYE HOSPITAL & THE VERTIGO CLINIC Abhigna Eye Hospital Blurred vision, can't read newspaper or mobile phone sms, Reduced vision, hazy vision, not able to read, missing letters while reading, one eye less vision, upper side less vision, loss of vision in lower or right or left half, sudden vision loss, central vision loss, central blurred vision, sudden loss of vison, pain along with vision loss, hair and ring the vision, something in front my eyes, eye pain, headache while reading or watching TV or Computer These are some of the symptoms patients presents to us. Every visual symptoms need systemic work up to diagnose and help patient see best. We at Abhigna Eye Hospital dedicated for the complete clinical work up with added necessary investigations and treatment will help you see better. We believes in, "PREVENTIVE EYE CARE" , where Clinical Skills, Preventive Medicine and Appropriate Timely Treatment will reduce the burden on patient for better healthy vision. "Personalized Eye Care" _______________________________________________________________________ The Vertigo Clinic First of its kind Clinic for disorders like VESTIBULAR MIGRAINE, BPPV (Benign Paroxysmal Positional Vertigo) MENIERS’S DISEASE, IMBALANCE, DIZZINESS, DEAFNESS, TINNITUS etc.. These are chronic conditions which affect daily life of patients. We adopt a holistic type of treatment towards management of these cases where not only the disease but also its impact on everyday life is addressed. As these are chronic conditions not just the medications but counselling the patients plays a major role..Explaining them about the disease, it’s effects on everyday life, effects on body and mind,mechanisms to cope , life style changes,goes a long way in combating these chronic conditions… Don’t suffer ”VERTIGO IS CURABLE” “WALK AHEAD ; BEYOND VERTIGO” ______________________________________________________________________ Dr Jaitra - Cataract and Vitreo-Retinal Surgeon Dr Tejaswini - Vertigo Specialist Dr Jaitra’s interview on News 18 Kannada on Diabetic Retinopathy Awareness Message Dr Tejaswini TV Interviews on Vertigo and Migraine Neve | Powered by WordPress Dr Jaitra’s interview on News 18 Kannada on Diabetic Retinopathy Awareness Message Dr Tejaswini TV Interviews on Vertigo and Migraine Neve | Powered by WordPress
